rationale: Add a small procedural guard to prefer short argument passing and file-based payloads to reduce Windows CLI length risk, without reading any additional files.

edits.content: {"schema":"brainflow.procedural.v1","name":"cli_arg_length_guard","rules":["Prefer file-based inputs over long CLI args","Avoid embedding large JSON in command line","Use temp files for payloads and references"],"notes":"Added to reduce Windows command line length issues."}

risks: Minimal; adds a new procedural note file only.
expected_benefit: Lower risk of Windows CLI arg-length failures by promoting file-based payload passing.
